ui.title: QuestPath
ui.tagline: The Stories of the Lands Between
ui.warn.veiled: This step can be missed by advancing the world or other quests. Switch Guidance Mode to Full Guide to see the details.
ui.untrackable: QuestPath can't detect this step automatically — tick it off yourself.
ui.opt.guidance_mode.help: Minimal: only completed steps and overall progress, no hints. Hints: spoiler-safe direction for your current objective; future steps stay hidden. Full Guide: the complete step-by-step guide, nothing hidden (click any step).
ui.opt.details.help: Show a short recap under each step you have already completed.
ui.opt.group.help: Organize quests by their current region. When a quest advances and its characters relocate, the quest automatically appears under the appropriate region
ui.opt.text_size.help: Scales the text of the quest cards (names, steps, guidance). Buttons, tabs and titles keep their size.
ui.opt.text_size.sample: Quest steps and guidance will read like this.
ui.empty.active: No quests in progress. Explore the Lands Between and speak to the folk you meet.
ui.empty.available: Nothing new to begin from here yet.
ui.wait.title: Waiting for your journey
ui.wait.body: Load into your save (not the main menu) and QuestPath will read your progress automatically.
ui.footer.back_hint: Press %s or ESC to go back
q1.name: Irina's Quest
q1.start: Bridge of Sacrifice, on the way into the Weeping Peninsula
q1.s1.title: Irina's Letter
q1.s1.recap: You accepted Irina's letter to deliver to her father Edgar at Castle Morne.
q1.s1.next: Speak to Irina just past the Bridge of Sacrifice, at the entrance to the Weeping Peninsula, and accept her letter for her father.
q1.s1.hint: Irina can be found near the Bridge of Sacrifice, at the entrance to the Weeping Peninsula.
q1.s1.warn: Do not kill Irina yourself, or Hyetta will never appear this playthrough. (If you never take the letter at all, Irina lives - but Edgar stays at Castle Morne and Hyetta never appears either.)
q1.s2.title: Delivering the Letter
q1.s2.recap: You delivered Irina's letter to Edgar at Castle Morne.
q1.s2.next: Deliver Irina's letter to Edgar atop the ramparts of Castle Morne (follow the walkway from the castle plaza).
q1.s2.hint: Irina's letter points toward Castle Morne's ramparts.
q1.s2.warn: You can defeat the Leonine Misbegotten before talking to Edgar without failing the quest - just give him the letter afterward.
q1.s3.title: Irina's Fate
q1.s3.recap: You found Edgar mourning over Irina's body; he swore vengeance against her killers.
q1.s3.next: Defeat the Leonine Misbegotten at the base of Castle Morne, speak with Edgar again on the ramparts, then return to where Irina sat - you will find Edgar mourning over her.
q1.s3.hint: The fighting at Castle Morne is not yet settled; the lower shore and ramparts still deserve attention.
q1.s4.title: Edgar's Vendetta
q1.s4.recap: Edgar, maddened by grief, invaded you as 'Edgar the Revenger' and fell.
q1.s4.next: Travel to the Revenger's Shack on the western shore of Liurnia and defeat the invader 'Edgar the Revenger'. (Killing Edgar anywhere also concludes this.)
q1.s4.hint: A lonely shack on Liurnia's western shore is tied to Edgar's grief.
q2.name: Roderika's Quest
q2.start: Stormhill Shack, just past the Gatefront ruins
q2.s1.title: Meeting Roderika
q2.s1.recap: You met Roderika at the Stormhill Shack; she mentioned her companions being grafted.
q2.s1.next: Meet Roderika at the Stormhill Shack and exhaust her dialogue; she teaches the Sitting Sideways gesture and gives the Spirit Jellyfish Ashes.
q2.s1.hint: Roderika shelters at the Stormhill Shack, on the road toward Stormveil.
q2.s2.title: Seeking Purpose
q2.s2.recap: You met Roderika at the Roundtable Hold; she is looking for her purpose.
q2.s2.next: Roderika moves to the Roundtable Hold once you bring her the Chrysalids' Memento (found on the pile of grafted corpses in Stormveil Castle) or reach a site of grace beyond Limgrave and the Weeping Peninsula. Speak with her by the fireplace - she gives a Golden Seed (or leaves it at the shack). The Memento can still be handed over at the Roundtable.
q2.s2.hint: You may want to look for Roderika by the Roundtable Hold's fireplace.
q2.s3.title: An Innate Talent
q2.s3.recap: Hewg mentioned that Roderika has an innate talent for spirit tuning.
q2.s3.next: Speak with Blacksmith Hewg about Roderika; he notes her gift for spirit-tuning.
q2.s3.hint: The Roundtable's blacksmith may see something in Roderika that she cannot.
q2.s4.title: A New Calling
q2.s4.recap: Roderika decided to learn spirit tuning after you told her what Hewg said.
q2.s4.next: Tell Roderika what Hewg said about her talent; she resolves to learn spirit-tuning.
q2.s4.hint: Roderika may want to hear what Hewg thinks of her.
q2.s5.title: Hewg's Reluctance
q2.s5.recap: Hewg was skeptical but agreed to train Roderika.
q2.s5.next: Speak with Hewg again and talk him into taking Roderika as an apprentice.
q2.s5.hint: Hewg may need another word about Roderika.
q2.s6.title: Apprentice Spirit Tuner
q2.s6.recap: Roderika has become an apprentice spirit tuner.
q2.s6.next: Rest at a site of grace; Roderika moves beside Hewg and can strengthen your Spirit Ashes from then on. (Her Crimson Hood can be picked up by the chrysalid pile in Stormveil.)
q2.s6.hint: The Roundtable may look a little different after you rest.
q3.name: Sorceress Sellen's Quest
q3.s1.title: The Primeval Current
q3.s1.recap: You became Sellen's student at the Waypoint Ruins.
q3.s1.next: Find Sorceress Sellen beneath the Waypoint Ruins in east Limgrave (defeat the Mad Pumpkin Head guarding her chamber) and become her student. Her story only continues once you have found Primeval Sorcerer Azur in the Hermit Village on Mt. Gelmir.
q3.s1.hint: A sorceress studies beneath the Waypoint Ruins, east of Agheel Lake.
q3.s2.title: Finding Lusat
q3.s2.recap: You found Master Lusat sealed in the Sellia Hideaway and told Sellen; she rewarded you with Starlight Shards.
q3.s2.next: Find Primeval Sorcerer Azur in the Hermit Village on Mt. Gelmir (he grants Comet Azur), then return to Sellen: show her Azur's magic, ask about her, and agree to help. Use the Sellian Sealbreaker she gives you in the Sellia Hideaway - its entrance is an illusory wall behind the largest gravestone uphill from the Church of the Plague, northeast of Sellia - receive Stars of Ruin from Lusat, and report back to her.
q3.s2.hint: Sellen's trail points toward a primeval sorcerer secluded in the Hermit Village on Mt. Gelmir.
q3.s3.title: Sellen's True Body
q3.s3.recap: At the Witchbane Ruins, Sellen's true body entrusted you with her Primal Glintstone.
q3.s3.next: After defeating Starscourge Radahn, speak with Sellen at the Waypoint Ruins: she reveals her true body lies chained beneath the Witchbane Ruins on the Weeping Peninsula. Find it there to receive Sellen's Primal Glintstone.
q3.s3.hint: Radahn's hold on the stars blocks Sellen's path.
q3.s3.warn: Do not strike the chained body - destroying it kills Sellen and ends her questline.
q3.s4.title: Jerren's Warning
q3.s4.recap: Jerren told you his side of Sellen's history - and carried out his old promise.
q3.s4.next: Defeat the boss in Redmane Castle's plaza and exhaust Castellan Jerren's dialogue there. When you next travel elsewhere, the Primal Glintstone trembles: Jerren has carried out his old promise and executed Sellen's imprisoned body.
q3.s4.hint: With the festival quiet, Redmane Castle's castellan still lingers.
q3.s5.title: A New Body
q3.s5.recap: You gave Sellen a new body; she has gone to the Grand Library of Raya Lucaria.
q3.s5.next: Bring the Primal Glintstone to Seluvis's secret cellar: its hidden entrance lies among the small ruins just north of Ranni's Rise at the Three Sisters. Place the glintstone in the puppet body there and speak with the reborn Sellen - she departs for the Academy.
q3.s5.hint: Sellen's trail leads beneath the Three Sisters, among the ruins north of Ranni's Rise.
q3.s6.title: Siding with Jerren
q3.s6.recap: You sided with Jerren and killed Sellen.
q3.s6.next: At the Grand Library of Raya Lucaria, choose Jerren's summon sign and defeat Sellen; speak with Jerren by the gate afterward.
q3.s6.hint: Two summon signs wait before the Grand Library.
q3.s6.warn: Branch point - the two summon signs before the Grand Library decide who lives. Choosing Jerren ends Sellen's questline here.
q3.s7.title: Siding with Sellen
q3.s7.recap: You sided with Sellen and killed Jerren.
q3.s7.next: At the Grand Library, choose Sellen's summon sign and defeat Witch-Hunter Jerren; speak with Sellen inside afterward (she gives the Eccentric's set and Glintstone Kris, and sells Shard Spiral).
q3.s7.hint: Two summon signs wait before the Grand Library.
q3.s7.warn: Branch point - choosing Sellen kills Jerren.
q3.s8.title: The School of Mages
q3.s8.recap: Sellen's ambition consumed her: a school of graven mages now sits in the Grand Library.
q3.s8.next: Rest, then return to the Grand Library: Sellen has become a Graven School of sorcerers. The Witch's Glintstone Crown lies beside her, and she still sells her sorceries.
q3.s8.hint: After a rest, the Grand Library is worth another look.
q3.s99.title: Sellen's Death
q3.s99.next: Quest complete; Sellen is dead (if you chose that path).
q4.name: Kenneth Haight's Quest
q4.start: Atop a ruined gate on the road northeast of the Mistwood Outskirts, east Limgrave
q4.s1.title: Fort Haight
q4.s1.recap: Kenneth Haight asked you to reclaim Fort Haight.
q4.s1.next: Hear out Kenneth Haight, shouting from a ruined gate northeast of the Mistwood Outskirts grace, and accept his request to retake Fort Haight (south, beyond the Mistwood).
q4.s1.hint: A noble voice calls from atop a ruin on the road north of the Mistwood.
q4.s2.title: Fort Liberated
q4.s2.recap: You conquered Fort Haight and reported back to Kenneth.
q4.s2.next: Clear Fort Haight - kill the Knight of Godrick commanding it - and report back to Kenneth; he rewards you with the Erdsteel Dagger.
q4.s2.hint: Fort Haight, south beyond the Mistwood, is Kenneth's concern.
q4.s3.title: Swearing Fealty
q4.s3.recap: You pledged your service to Kenneth.
q4.s3.next: Accept Kenneth's offer to enter his service (if you refuse at first, you can still accept later at Fort Haight, where he relocates).
q4.s3.hint: Kenneth has returned to Fort Haight and awaits your answer.
q4.s4.title: The Search for a Lord
q4.s4.recap: You found Kenneth at his ruined fort; he wants to find a proper Lord for Limgrave.
q4.s4.next: After defeating Godrick, speak with Kenneth at Fort Haight; lacking a rightful lord to serve, he worries over Limgrave's future.
q4.s4.hint: With Stormveil's lord gone, Fort Haight is worth revisiting.
q4.s5.title: A Lord for Limgrave
q4.s5.recap: Kenneth finally found a Lord for Limgrave.
q4.s5.next: See Nepheli Loux's questline to its end (deliver the Stormhawk King ashes to her at the Roundtable Hold), then defeat Morgott, the Omen King, in Leyndell. Rest at Godrick's grace in Stormveil Castle - Kenneth and Nepheli both appear in the throne room; speak with them there.
q4.s5.hint: Limgrave's future may be settled where Godrick once held court.
q4.s5.warn: Requires Godrick and Morgott both defeated, plus Nepheli's own questline completed - so kill neither Kenneth nor Nepheli.
q4.s99.title: No Lord to be Found
q4.s99.next: Quest complete; Kenneth is dead (if you killed him).
q4.s99.warn: Killing Kenneth drops a Golden Seed but permanently ends his questline (Nepheli's is unaffected).
q5.name: Boc's Quest
q5.start: A small bush beside the Agheel Lake North site of grace — listen for a plea for help
q5.s1.title: Freeing Boc
q5.s1.recap: You freed Boc from the spell that held him as a tree; he gave you mushrooms in thanks.
q5.s1.next: Beside the Agheel Lake North site of grace, a voice calls for help from a small bush by the road - strike it once to free Boc.
q5.s1.hint: The plea near Agheel Lake North comes from somewhere right beside the road.
q5.s2.title: Boc in Trouble
q5.s2.recap: You found Boc beaten by demi-humans near a cave.
q5.s2.next: Meet Boc at the entrance to the Coastal Cave on the beach of west Limgrave; he lies hurt beside the site of grace there.
q5.s2.hint: Boc has returned to a cave on Limgrave's western coast.
q5.s3.title: The Sewing Needle
q5.s3.recap: You gave Boc a sewing needle found in the cave.
q5.s3.next: Defeat the two Demi-Human Chiefs inside the Coastal Cave, then give Boc his mother's Sewing Needle - he takes heart and becomes your tailor.
q5.s3.hint: Boc's cave on the western coast still holds what was taken from him.
q5.s4.title: The Golden Sewing Needle
q5.s4.recap: You obtained the Gold Sewing Needle from the Church of Vows.
q5.s4.next: Take the Gold Sewing Needle from a chest in the Church of Vows, northeastern Liurnia. Boc moves along your journey to the Liurnia Lake-Facing Cliffs. You have to rest at the site of grace for him to appear.
q5.s4.hint: A golden needle may be found in northeastern Liurnia, at the Church of Vows.
q5.s5.title: A Gift of Gold
q5.s5.recap: Boc received the golden needle and swore to become a golden seamster.
q5.s5.next: Give Boc the Gold Sewing Needle at his stop beside Leyndell's East Capital Rampart grace; with it he can alter the garments of demigods (sold by Enia at the Roundtable Hold).
q5.s5.hint: Your seamster waits near Leyndell's east rampart, if you have a golden gift.
q5.s6.title: Rebirth Attempt
q5.s6.recap: You gave Boc a Larval Tear to be reborn by Rennala.
q5.s6.next: After Rennala is defeated, Boc asks whether he should be reborn. This is a branch point: giving him a Larval Tear sends him to Rennala's chamber to be remade (and die); refusing - either by using the 'You're Beautiful' Prattling Pate on him or simply declining - keeps him alive instead.
q5.s6.hint: Boc's doubts deserve care before you answer him.
q5.s6.warn: Rebirth kills Boc: reborn as a human, he dies when the area reloads. For an alive ending, use the prattling pate 'You're beautiful' beside him - he hears his mother's voice and makes peace with himself - or simply decline the tear; either way he relocates outside the Raya Lucaria Grand Library instead of Rennala's chamber.
q5.s7.title: A New Boc
q5.s7.recap: Boc chose rebirth: reborn as a human at Rennala's side, his joy was short-lived.
q5.s7.next: If you gave Boc the Larval Tear, find him, reborn as a human, in Rennala's chamber at the Academy - his joy is short-lived, and he dies when the area reloads. If instead you used the 'You're Beautiful' Prattling Pate or declined the tear, Boc survives and can be found outside the Raya Lucaria Grand Library.
q5.s7.hint: After Boc's choice, the Grand Library and the Full Moon Queen's chamber are both worth checking.
q5.s99.title: Boc's Death
q6.name: Blaidd's Quest
q6.start: Follow the wolf's howl in the Mistwood, east Limgrave
q6.s1.title: Howling in Mistwood
q6.s1.recap: You heard a wolf's howling in Mistwood Ruins.
q6.s1.next: Hear the wolf's howl atop the Mistwood Ruins in eastern Limgrave.
q6.s1.hint: A wolf howls over the Mistwood in eastern Limgrave.
q6.s2.title: The Snap Gesture
q6.s2.recap: Kalé taught you how to snap your fingers.
q6.s2.next: Ask Merchant Kale at the Church of Elleh about the howling; he teaches you the 'Snap' gesture.
q6.s2.hint: Merchant Kale at the Church of Elleh knows something about that howl.
q6.s3.title: Meeting Blaidd
q6.s3.recap: You spoke with Blaidd; he is hunting Darriwil.
q6.s3.next: Use the 'Snap' gesture near the Mistwood Ruins while the howl sounds; Blaidd comes down to speak with you.
q6.s3.hint: The howl in the Mistwood may answer a familiar gesture.
q6.s4.title: The Hunt's End
q6.s4.recap: You slew Darriwil with Blaidd; he commended you to War Counselor Iji in northwest Liurnia.
q6.s4.next: Meet Blaidd at the Forlorn Hound Evergaol in south Limgrave and summon him inside to defeat Bloodhound Knight Darriwil together. He rewards you and commends you to War Counselor Iji, up the road toward Caria Manor in northwest Liurnia.
q6.s4.hint: Blaidd's quarry has drawn him toward an evergaol in south Limgrave.
q6.s4.warn: Defeating Darriwil before meeting Blaidd does not break the quest - just return to the Evergaol after talking to him.
q6.s5.title: Blaidd's Predicament
q6.s5.recap: You found Blaidd in Siofra; he can't find a way to reach Nokron.
q6.s5.next: After entering Ranni's service, find Blaidd in the Siofra River depths - among the ruins by the spirit spring near the Siofra River Bank grace. He is stumped; press Seluvis for what he knows, follow his recommendation to Sorceress Sellen, and bring her counsel about the stars back to Blaidd.
q6.s5.hint: Blaidd searches for a way into the eternal city, somewhere beneath the Mistwood's well.
q6.s5.warn: If the Radahn Festival has already begun, Blaidd skips Siofra and waits at Redmane Castle instead - this step is simply passed over.
q6.s6.title: The Radahn Festival
q6.s6.recap: You met Blaidd at Redmane Castle, awaiting the festival of war.
q6.s6.next: Travel to Redmane Castle for the Radahn Festival (it begins once you enter Altus - e.g. via the Grand Lift of Dectus - or approach the castle) and speak with Blaidd among the champions.
q6.s6.hint: A festival gathers champions at Redmane Castle in southern Caelid.
q6.s7.title: The Fallen Star
q6.s7.recap: After Radahn fell, Blaidd pointed you to the star's crater - though duty pulled him elsewhere.
q6.s7.next: Defeat Starscourge Radahn and speak with Blaidd on the arena as the falling star opens the way to Nokron. He promises to meet you at the crater but never arrives - Iji explains he was sent elsewhere. Later you can find Blaidd locked in the Forlorn Hound Evergaol (stand on its seal to speak, and free him if you wish).
q6.s7.hint: After the festival, the battlefield under the fallen star is worth one last look.
q6.s99.title: Blaidd's Fate
q6.s99.next: Blaidd's story has ended. Once Ranni's questline concludes, he waits maddened outside Ranni's Rise; defeating him yields the Royal Greatsword and his armor.
q7.name: Sorcerer Thops' Quest
q7.s1.title: The Glintstone Key
q7.s1.recap: Thops asked you to find a glintstone key to return to the Academy.
q7.s1.next: Speak with Sorcerer Thops at the Church of Irith in southern Liurnia; he asks for a glintstone key so he can return to the Academy. (Your own key - from the corpse guarded by Glintstone Dragon Smarag west of the Academy - cannot be handed over; he needs one of his own.)
q7.s1.hint: A humble sorcerer prays at the Church of Irith, just up the cliff from Stormveil.
q7.s2.title: A Key for Thops
q7.s2.recap: You gave Thops his own Academy Glintstone Key so he could resume his studies.
q7.s2.next: Find the second Academy Glintstone Key inside the Academy: climb to the rooftops from the Debate Parlor courtyard, work your way down across the roofs to the rafters above the Church of the Cuckoo, and drop onto the hanging chandelier that holds the key. Give it to Thops at the Church of Irith.
q7.s2.hint: The Academy's spare key is somewhere high above the Church of the Cuckoo.
q7.s99.title: Thops' Death
q7.s99.recap: Sorcerer Thops is dead, returned at last to his beloved Academy.
q7.s99.next: Thops returned to the Academy. He sits at the Schoolhouse Classroom grace room - found dead over his desk, leaving his bell bearing, the Academy Glintstone Staff, and Thops's Barrier.
q8.name: Patches' Quest
q8.s1.title: Patches' Ambush
q8.s1.recap: You met Patches in Murkwater Cave; he surrendered after ambushing you.
q8.s1.next: Fight Patches in Murkwater Cave (up the river north of Agheel Lake) until he surrenders, then spare him to open his shop.
q8.s1.hint: Something, or someone, guards a treasure chest in Murkwater Cave.
q8.s1.warn: Killing Patches locks you out of his entire questline and cannot be undone with Celestial Dew.
q8.s2.title: The Trapped Chest
q8.s2.recap: You opened a trapped chest and were teleported away; you cannot fast travel until you rest.
q8.s2.next: Open the chest in his cave; it teleports you to the Mistwood (a harmless prank - you cannot fast travel until the transporter trap wears off).
q8.s2.hint: That guarded chest in Murkwater Cave is hard for Patches to leave alone.
q8.s3.title: The Iron Maiden Trick
q8.s3.recap: Patches mentioned an Iron Maiden at the Academy waterwheel that will gate you.
q8.s3.next: Once you reach Liurnia, find Patches at the Scenic Isle site of grace; he claims the Abductor Virgin beneath the Academy's great waterwheel can carry you 'to the foot of the Erdtree'. He also asks you to hear out Rya, whom he saw on the road in Liurnia.
q8.s3.hint: Patches can next be found at Scenic Isle in Liurnia.
q8.s4.title: Volcano Manor Teleport
q8.s4.recap: You were tricked by Patches and teleported to Volcano Manor.
q8.s4.next: Let the Abductor Virgin at the bottom of the Academy's waterwheel kill you with its grab attack - you awaken in the underground of Volcano Manor, and can fight your way out through Mt. Gelmir.
q8.s4.hint: The Academy's great waterwheel hides the iron maiden Patches mentioned.
q8.s4.warn: You must die to its grab specifically; dying any other way there is just a death.
q8.s5.title: The Shiny Path
q8.s5.recap: Patches pointed you to a shimmering trail of stones.
q8.s5.next: Find Patches camped just west of the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace; he points out a glittering trail of rainbow stones leading to a 'treasure'.
q8.s5.hint: Patches has made camp west of the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite.
q8.s6.title: Patches' Betrayal
q8.s6.recap: Patches kicked you down a cliff.
q8.s6.next: Follow the rainbow stones to the overlook - Patches kicks you off the cliff. Survive the fall (it isn't lethal), then return and speak with him; he warns you about the recusants of Volcano Manor.
q8.s6.hint: The rainbow stones on Mt. Gelmir deserve caution.
q8.s7.title: A New Affiliation
q8.s7.recap: You met Patches again after joining Volcano Manor.
q8.s7.next: Join Volcano Manor (accept Tanith's offer) and speak with Patches in the drawing room.
q8.s7.hint: Volcano Manor may have room for an old acquaintance.
q8.s8.title: Patches' Missive
q8.s8.recap: Patches gave you a letter naming an assassination target: Great Horned Tragoth.
q8.s8.next: Receive Patches' Letter at Volcano Manor: your target is Great Horned Tragoth.
q8.s8.hint: Patches has a letter waiting at Volcano Manor.
q8.s9.title: Mission Complete
q8.s9.recap: You slew Great Horned Tragoth and Patches paid you the Magma Whip Candlestick.
q8.s9.next: Invade via the red summon sign at the Ruin-Strewn Precipice (the canyon at Liurnia's northern end) and slay Great Horned Tragoth, then report to Patches for the Magma Whip Candlestick. (Patches later returns to Murkwater Cave, with a stop at the Shaded Castle where he entrusts you the Dancer's Castanets for Tanith.)
q8.s9.hint: Patches' mark is tied to the Ruin-Strewn Precipice.
q8.s99.title: Patches' Demise
q8.s99.next: Quest complete; Patches is dead (if you killed him).
q9.name: Ranni's Quest
q9.s1.title: Ranni's Service
q9.s1.recap: You spoke with Ranni and accepted to serve her.
q9.s1.next: Reach the Three Sisters by clearing Caria Manor (defeat Royal Knight Loretta), then enter Ranni's Rise and pledge yourself to Ranni the Witch's service.
q9.s1.hint: A witch keeps her tower at the Three Sisters, beyond Caria Manor.
q9.s2.title: The Treasure of Nokron
q9.s2.recap: Ranni tasked you to retrieve a treasure from Nokron.
q9.s2.next: Hear Ranni's task: retrieve the hidden treasure of Nokron, the Eternal City - the Fingerslayer Blade.
q9.s2.hint: Ranni has a task to name at her tower.
q9.s3.title: Seeking Clues
q9.s3.recap: Speak with Blaidd, Iji, and Seluvis to find a way to Nokron.
q9.s3.next: Speak with Ranni's three servants - Blaidd, War Counselor Iji, and Preceptor Seluvis - to gather clues on reaching Nokron. Blaidd heads for the well in the Mistwood; Iji watches the road below Caria Manor; Seluvis keeps the neighbouring tower.
q9.s3.hint: Ranni's three servants each hold a piece of the way forward.
q9.s4.title: Introduction to Sellen
q9.s4.recap: Seluvis introduced you to Sorceress Sellen.
q9.s4.next: Take Seluvis's Introduction to Sorceress Sellen beneath the Waypoint Ruins; she explains that the stars - and Ranni's fate - are held still by General Radahn. Bring her counsel back to Blaidd in Siofra.
q9.s4.hint: Seluvis's letter points back to the sorceress beneath Waypoint Ruins.
q9.s5.title: Defeat Radahn
q9.s5.recap: Defeat General Radahn to move Ranni's destiny forward.
q9.s5.next: Defeat Starscourge Radahn at Redmane Castle's festival; his death sets the stars in motion, and a falling star tears open the way to Nokron.
q9.s5.hint: The stars will not move while the general stands.
q9.s6.title: The Fallen Star
q9.s6.recap: Radahn is defeated, unlocking the path to Nokron.
q9.s6.next: Enter Nokron through the crater in the Mistwood (southeast of Fort Haight West) and make your way through the Eternal City.
q9.s6.hint: A star has fallen on Limgrave; its crater leads somewhere ancient.
q9.s7.title: The Fingerslayer Blade
q9.s7.recap: You found the Fingerslayer Blade in Nokron.
q9.s7.next: Past the Mimic Tear, cross the Ancestral Woods and descend into the Night's Sacred Ground; the Fingerslayer Blade rests in a chest at its end.
q9.s7.hint: Nokron's sacred ground hides the treasure Ranni seeks.
q9.s8.title: The Carian Inverted Statue
q9.s8.recap: You gave Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade and received the Carian Inverted Statue.
q9.s8.next: Give Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade; she grants the Carian Inverted Statue and releases you from her service - but her story is not done.
q9.s8.hint: Ranni's tower is the next place for the treasure.
q9.s9.title: The Cursemark of Death
q9.s9.recap: You obtained the Cursemark of Death.
q9.s9.next: Place the Carian Inverted Statue on the pedestal in the Carian Study Hall to invert it; descend the inverted hall to the Divine Tower of Liurnia and take the Cursemark of Death enshrined there. (The Cursemark serves Rogier's and Fia's tales.)
q9.s9.hint: The Carian Study Hall on Liurnia's east shore may reveal the statue's purpose.
q9.s10.title: Ranni's Doll
q9.s10.recap: You found a miniature doll of Ranni.
q9.s10.next: After Ranni vanishes from her tower, take the waygate atop Renna's Rise (now unsealed) down to the Ainsel River Main, and pick up the Miniature Ranni doll beside the site of grace there.
q9.s10.hint: A new waygate has opened atop Renna's Rise.
q9.s11.title: Ranni's Voice
q9.s11.recap: Ranni spoke through the doll and tasked you to kill the Baleful Shadow.
q9.s11.next: Rest at a nearby site of grace and choose 'Talk to the doll' three times; Ranni speaks through it and asks you to slay the Baleful Shadow.
q9.s11.hint: A grace in Ainsel's depths may draw a voice from the doll.
q9.s12.title: The Dark Moon Ring
q9.s12.recap: You found the Dark Moon Ring; seek an altar bathed in moonlight.
q9.s12.next: Continue through Nokstella, Eternal City, and descend beside its waterfall; the Baleful Shadow ambushes you there - defeat it for the Discarded Palace Key, which opens the chest in the Raya Lucaria Grand Library holding the Dark Moon Ring.
q9.s12.hint: The path beneath Nokstella leads toward one of Ranni's enemies.
q9.s13.title: The Age of Stars
q9.s13.recap: Become Elden Lord with Ranni to begin the Age of Stars.
q9.s13.next: Cross the Lake of Rot, ride the stone coffin over the great falls, and defeat Astel, Naturalborn of the Void. Climb to the Moonlight Altar, enter the Cathedral of Manus Celes, and descend through the hole in its floor to place the Dark Moon Ring on Ranni's finger. Afterwards, claim the Dark Moon Greatsword where she sat.
q9.s13.hint: Past the Lake of Rot, the dark moon watches over a hidden cathedral.
q9.s13.warn: Taking the Three Fingers' Frenzied Flame locks out Ranni's ending unless cured with Miquella's Needle. To see the Age of Stars, summon Ranni's blue sign after the final boss.
q9.s99.title: Ranni's Anger
q9.s99.recap: You angered Ranni and she disappeared.
q9.s99.next: Ranni is angered and disappears if you attack her or give her Seluvis's draught.
q10.name: Rya's Quest
q10.start: Scenic Isle / Laskyar Ruins, southern Liurnia
q10.s1.title: The Stolen Necklace
q10.s1.recap: You agreed to help Rya retrieve her necklace from Blackguard Boggart.
q10.s1.next: Speak with Rya in the pavilion north of the Laskyar Ruins in southern Liurnia, then buy her stolen necklace back from Blackguard Big Boggart at the Boilprawn Shack for 1,000 runes. (Killing him for it works too, but he has his own tale left to live.)
q10.s1.hint: A lady in a pavilion north of the Laskyar Ruins has lost something dear.
q10.s2.title: Volcano Manor Invitation
q10.s2.recap: You helped Rya and received an invitation to Volcano Manor.
q10.s2.next: Return the necklace to Rya; she offers you an invitation to Volcano Manor and moves on ahead.
q10.s2.hint: The stolen necklace belongs to someone near the Laskyar Ruins.
q10.s3.title: Arrival at Volcano Manor
q10.s3.recap: Rya teleported you to Volcano Manor to speak with Tanith.
q10.s3.next: Reach the Altus Plateau; Rya waits near the Lux Ruins - left of the stairs atop the Grand Lift of Dectus, or, if you arrived via Ruin-Strewn Precipice, at the lower part of Lux Ruins up the stairs from Erdtree-Gazing Hill. Either way she can spirit you straight to Volcano Manor - speak with Tanith there and accept membership.
q10.s3.hint: On the Altus Plateau, Rya may be waiting near the Lux Ruins, depending on the road you took.
q10.s4.title: A New Recruit
q10.s4.recap: Rya was pleased to see you take the quest from the Drawing Room.
q10.s4.next: Speak with Rya again inside Volcano Manor; she is pleased you accepted the invitation.
q10.s4.hint: Your recruiter is somewhere inside Volcano Manor.
q10.s5.title: Strange Sounds
q10.s5.recap: Rya heard strange sounds from the walls.
q10.s5.next: Advance the Manor's assassination requests (take the letters in the drawing room), then talk to Rya - she is shaken by strange sounds from within the walls.
q10.s5.hint: The Manor's letters and Rya's worries are starting to point the same way.
q10.s6.title: Rya's True Form
q10.s6.recap: Rya accidentally revealed her serpentine form to you.
q10.s6.next: Exhaust Rya's dialogue; mid-conversation her illusion slips, revealing her true serpentine form.
q10.s6.hint: Rya's worries are not yet spent.
q10.s7.title: The Serpent's Trail
q10.s7.recap: Rya saw a serpent enter a room and never exit.
q10.s7.next: Rya tells of a serpent that entered a chamber and never left; the manor's walls hide more than recusants.
q10.s7.hint: Rya saw something slip into a room and never come out.
q10.s8.title: Volcano Manor's Secrets
q10.s8.recap: You revealed the truth about Volcano Manor to Rya.
q10.s8.next: Open the illusory wall in the drawing room's far chamber to find the manor's hidden halls, then speak with Rya about what you've learned.
q10.s8.hint: The manor hides more than recusants; its walls deserve a closer look.
q10.s9.title: The Serpent's Amnion
q10.s9.recap: You gave Rya the Serpent's Amnion; she wants to know more about her mother.
q10.s9.next: Fight through the hidden halls to the Temple of Eiglay, defeat the Godskin Noble, and take the Serpent's Amnion from the altar. Give it to Rya in her chamber; she asks after the truth of her birth.
q10.s9.hint: Volcano Manor's hidden depths may hold a clue to Rya's birth.
q10.s9.warn: Defeating Rykard empties the Manor - see Rya's story through (the Amnion and her final choice) before killing him, or she disappears.
q10.s10.title: The Tonic of Forgetfulness
q10.s10.recap: Rya disappeared; Tanith asked you to give her the Tonic of Forgetfulness.
q10.s10.next: Rya leaves her chamber; speak with Tanith, who hands you the Tonic of Forgetfulness and asks that Rya drink it.
q10.s10.hint: Tanith may know more about Rya's absence.
q10.s11.title: Rya's Request
q10.s11.recap: Rya asked you to kill her after discovering how she was born.
q10.s11.next: Find Rya/Zorayas in a small chamber deep in Volcano Manor's hidden interior, beside a lava pit ringed with cages and skulls - reachable via the wooden elevator by the Temple of Eiglay (exit through the hidden doorway, then out a window and across a lava floe to her alcove), or by dropping from the Temple of Eiglay's top balcony into the lava pit and climbing up. Knowing how she was born, she asks you to kill her.
q10.s11.hint: Rya has withdrawn deeper into the manor, somewhere beyond the Temple of Eiglay.
q10.s12.title: Rya's Champion
q10.s12.recap: You refused to kill Rya or give her the tonic.
q10.s12.next: Refuse to kill her and withhold the tonic; exhaust her dialogue. After Rykard falls, she resolves to find her own path.
q10.s12.hint: Rya's future depends on what you decide in the manor's depths.
q10.s12.warn: Branch point: kill her, give the tonic, or refuse both - each ends Rya's story differently.
q10.s13.title: Rya's Oblivion
q10.s13.recap: You gave Rya the Tonic of Forgetfulness.
q10.s13.next: Give Rya the Tonic of Forgetfulness; her doubts - and her memories of the truth - dissolve, and she returns to the manor at peace.
q10.s13.hint: Rya's future depends on what you decide in the manor's depths.
q10.s13.warn: Branch point: kill her, give the tonic, or refuse both - each ends Rya's story differently.
q10.s99.title: Rya's Death
q10.s99.next: Rya is dead if you kill her.
q11.name: Gowry's Quest
q11.start: Gowry's Shack, near the Sellia gate in Caelid
q11.s1.title: The Unalloyed Gold Needle
q11.s1.recap: Gowry asked you to help Millicent; he directed you to the swamp.
q11.s1.next: Speak with Gowry in his shack on the road to Sellia's gate; he asks you to fetch the Unalloyed Gold Needle so that Millicent might be saved.
q11.s1.hint: An old sage in a rickety shack outside Sellia asks a kindness.
q11.s1.warn: Gowry cannot truly be killed until Millicent's story ends - he simply returns.
q11.s2.title: Gowry's Examination
q11.s2.recap: You gave the needle to Gowry; he needs time to examine it.
q11.s2.next: Defeat Commander O'Neil amid the Swamp of Aeonia (he carries the Unalloyed Gold Needle) and bring the needle to Gowry.
q11.s2.hint: The needle Gowry seeks is somewhere in the Swamp of Aeonia.
q11.s3.title: The Repaired Needle
q11.s3.recap: Gowry repaired the needle; take it to Millicent.
q11.s3.next: Leave and return (or reload) while Gowry mends the needle, then collect it and take it to Millicent at the Church of the Plague, on the heights east of Sellia.
q11.s3.hint: Gowry needs time with the needle before Millicent's trail continues east.
q11.s4.title: Curing Millicent
q11.s4.recap: You gave the needle to Millicent, stopping her scarlet rot.
q11.s4.next: Give Millicent the repaired needle at the Church of the Plague, then rest; the needle stays the scarlet rot and she rises.
q11.s4.hint: The Church of the Plague is where Millicent waits.
q11.s5.title: Gowry's Isolation
q11.s5.recap: You spoke with Gowry after Millicent tried to visit him.
q11.s5.next: Visit Gowry's shack: Millicent rests there in his stead. Speak with her, and with Gowry once she departs for the Erdtree-Gazing Hill.
q11.s5.hint: Gowry's shack may not be as empty as it was.
q11.s6.title: Millicent's New Arm
q11.s6.recap: Gowry was pleased to hear about Millicent's new arm.
q11.s6.next: Retrieve the Valkyrie's Prosthesis from the Shaded Castle in northern Altus and give it to Millicent at the Erdtree-Gazing Hill; then share the news of her new arm with Gowry.
q11.s6.hint: Millicent's path leads to Altus, while a golden prosthesis waits in the Shaded Castle.
q11.s7.title: Following Millicent
q11.s7.recap: Gowry commented that Millicent is following her mother's footsteps to the Haligtree.
q11.s7.next: Speak with Gowry as Millicent follows her mother's footsteps toward the Haligtree.
q11.s7.hint: Gowry has thoughts on where Millicent is headed.
q11.s8.title: Gowry's Grief
q11.s8.recap: You found Gowry crying about Millicent's fate.
q11.s8.next: After the confrontation between Millicent and her sisters at the Haligtree, return to Gowry's shack; he weeps over how it ended.
q11.s8.hint: After the Haligtree, Gowry's shack is worth revisiting.
q11.s9.title: Millicent's Disownment
q11.s9.recap: Gowry is despaired about Millicent disowning the 'children of the rot'.
q11.s9.next: Speak with Gowry again; he despairs that Millicent disowned the children of the rot.
q11.s9.hint: Gowry may still have more to say in his grief.
q11.s10.title: Millicent's Death
q11.s10.recap: You told Gowry that Millicent has been killed.
q11.s10.next: Tell Gowry of Millicent's death. His purpose spent, he can at last be slain - he leaves behind the Flock's Canvas Talisman.
q11.s10.hint: Gowry's shack is where the last news belongs.
q11.s99.title: Gowry's Death
q11.s99.next: Gowry is dead (if you kill him).
q12.name: D's Quest
q12.start: Summonwater Village outskirts (Limgrave), then Roundtable Hold
q12.s1.title: Deathroot's Trail
q12.s1.recap: You showed D a Deathroot; he marked the way to Gurranq's Bestial Sanctum.
q12.s1.next: With a Deathroot in hand (defeat the Tibia Mariner at Summonwater Village), speak with D - at his post east of Summonwater or at the Roundtable Hold. He marks the Bestial Sanctum on your map and tells of the hidden waygate behind the Third Church of Marika.
q12.s1.hint: D may know what to make of the deathroot left by a mariner.
q12.s2.title: The Bestial Sanctum
q12.s2.recap: You met Gurranq at the Bestial Sanctum.
q12.s2.next: Take the waygate hidden in the brush behind the Third Church of Marika to northern Dragonbarrow, enter the Bestial Sanctum, and feed your Deathroot to Gurranq.
q12.s2.hint: A hidden waygate behind the Third Church of Marika leads to a distant sanctum.
q12.s3.title: Golden Order Comrade
q12.s3.recap: D acknowledged you as a comrade of the Golden Order.
q12.s3.next: Speak with D again at the Roundtable Hold; he names you a comrade of the Golden Order.
q12.s3.hint: D would hear how your errand went.
q12.s4.title: The Weathered Dagger
q12.s4.recap: You gave Fia's Weathered Dagger to D.
q12.s4.next: Accept the Weathered Dagger from Fia at the Roundtable (she asks that it be returned to its rightful owner) and hand it to D.
q12.s4.hint: Fia's dagger seems meant for someone at the Roundtable.
q12.s4.warn: Delivering the dagger seals D's fate. Keep the dagger (or never take it) if you would rather D live - though Fia's own tale then stalls.
q12.s5.title: Fia's Betrayal
q12.s5.recap: Fia killed D and left the Roundtable Hold.
q12.s5.next: Rest and return: D lies dead in the side chamber, and Fia has left the Roundtable. Collect D's Twinned armor beside him.
q12.s5.hint: After a rest, the Roundtable is worth another look.
q12.s6.title: D's Legacy
q12.s6.recap: You gave D's armor to his brother in Nokron.
q12.s6.next: In Nokron, near the Aqueduct-Facing Cliffs grace, find D's silent brother and give him D's Twinned armor.
q12.s6.hint: Somewhere in the eternal city, a silent man sits by the aqueduct.
q12.s7.title: Vengeance
q12.s7.recap: D's brother killed Fia to avenge him.
q12.s7.next: Once Fia's own story in the Deeproot Depths concludes, return there: D's brother has come for his vengeance and cut Fia down. The Twinned armor can be gathered once more where he leaves it.
q12.s7.hint: Fia's deepest dream is tied to the brothers' unfinished story.
q12.s99.title: D's Death
q13.name: Gurranq's Quest
q13.s1.title: Smell of Death
q13.s1.recap: You gave Gurranq a Deathroot at the Bestial Sanctum; he needs more.
q13.s1.next: Feed Gurranq Deathroot at the Bestial Sanctum - nine exist in all (Tibia Mariners and catacomb chests across the Lands Between). He grants a reward for each, beginning with the Clawmark Seal and Beast Eye.
q13.s1.hint: The beast clergyman hungers for what death leaves in the soil.
q13.s1.warn: Do not fight him to the death when he turns on you; he yields once his health falls far enough.
q13.s2.title: Gurranq's Rampage
q13.s2.recap: Gurranq attacked you after the 4th root; you pacified him.
q13.s2.next: After the fourth Deathroot, Gurranq attacks in a frenzy; strike him until he relents (around a third of his health), then he calms and accepts roots again.
q13.s2.hint: The beast's hunger has turned to frenzy, but it may yet be calmed.
q13.s3.title: Unending Hunger
q13.s3.recap: With the last Deathroot, Gurranq's hunger finally stilled; lucid, he spoke of his long duty.
q13.s3.next: Feed Gurranq the ninth and final Deathroot; his crazed hunger subsides at last, and he grants an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.
q13.s3.hint: The beast clergyman's hunger is nearly spent.
q14.name: Diallos' Quest
q14.s1.title: Lanya's Fate
q14.s1.recap: Diallos asked you to find his servant Lanya.
q14.s1.next: Speak with Diallos at the Roundtable Hold; he searches for his missing servant Lanya. Agree to keep an eye out.
q14.s1.hint: A knight of House Hoslow paces the Roundtable, worried for his servant.
q14.s2.title: Lanya's Body
q14.s2.recap: You found Lanya's body; Diallos wept over her and asked where to find her killers.
q14.s2.next: Find Diallos standing over Lanya's body in the ruins north of the Academy Gate Town in Liurnia; speak with him as he grieves.
q14.s2.hint: Look among the ruins north of the Academy Gate Town.
q14.s3.title: Volcano Manor Invitation
q14.s3.recap: Lanya's killers invited Diallos to join Volcano Manor.
q14.s3.next: Speak with Diallos again; he has traced Lanya's killers to Volcano Manor and sets out after them.
q14.s3.hint: Diallos' grief points toward Volcano Manor.
q14.s4.title: Joining Volcano Manor
q14.s4.recap: Diallos joined Volcano Manor, seemingly convinced.
q14.s4.next: Join Volcano Manor and find Diallos in its halls - now, to your surprise, a member himself.
q14.s4.hint: The trail of House Hoslow leads to the recusants' manor.
q14.s4.warn: Speak with Diallos at the Manor before defeating Rykard, or he never appears there and his story breaks.
q14.s5.title: Diallos' Foolishness
q14.s5.recap: You met Diallos again at Volcano Manor; he lamented his foolishness.
q14.s5.next: Exhaust Diallos' dialogue at the Manor as he admits he is not cut out for bloodshed and laments his foolishness.
q14.s5.hint: Diallos is having doubts about the recusant life.
q14.s6.title: The New Potentate
q14.s6.recap: You found Diallos in Jarburg; he became the new Potentate.
q14.s6.next: When the Manor's business is done with, find Diallos in Jarburg - the jar village on the cliffs below eastern Liurnia - where he has become the new Potentate.
q14.s6.hint: A humbled knight has found quieter work among the jars.
q14.s7.title: Diallos' Last Stand
q14.s7.recap: Diallos died a true knight of Hoslow, defending Jarburg from poachers.
q14.s7.next: Advance Jar-Bairn's story across several visits to Jarburg; poachers eventually raid the village, and Diallos takes a mortal wound defending it. Hear his final words.
q14.s7.hint: Jarburg's peace is fragile; its story unfolds across return visits.
q14.s8.title: Jar-Bairn's Vigil
q14.s8.recap: Jar-Bairn is looking after Diallos' corpse.
q14.s8.next: Speak with Jar-Bairn, who watches over Diallos; he takes Diallos' shard as his innards, honoring him.
q14.s99.title: Diallos' Death
q14.s99.warn: Completing the Volcano Manor legacy dungeon before speaking to Diallos there will cause him not to appear and break the quest.
q15.name: Seluvis' Quest
q15.s1.title: Seluvis' Potion
q15.s1.recap: You received a potion from Seluvis to give to Nepheli.
q15.s1.next: After entering Ranni's service, speak with Preceptor Seluvis in his rise at the Three Sisters; he presses a suspicious potion on you, to be given to Nepheli Loux.
q15.s1.hint: Ranni's preceptor has a discreet errand for you.
q15.s1.warn: What you do with the potion is a branch: Nepheli and the Dung Eater are doomed by it; Gideon quietly disposes of it.
q15.s2.title: Potion: Nepheli
q15.s2.recap: You gave the potion to Nepheli.
q15.s2.next: Give the potion to Nepheli while she despairs in the Roundtable Hold basement (only possible before she receives the Stormhawk King ashes).
q15.s2.hint: Seluvis's potion still needs an answer; several hands could receive it.
q15.s2.warn: This dooms Nepheli - she ends as a puppet in Seluvis's cellar, and her questline (and Stormveil's throne gathering) is lost.
q15.s3.title: Potion: Dung Eater
q15.s3.recap: You gave the potion to the Dung Eater.
q15.s3.next: Alternatively, give the potion to the Dung Eater while he sits in his Subterranean Shunning-Grounds cell; he becomes one of Seluvis's puppets.
q15.s3.hint: Seluvis's potion still needs an answer; several hands could receive it.
q15.s3.warn: This ends the Dung Eater's own questline (no Mending Rune of the Fell Curse).
q15.s4.title: Potion: Gideon
q15.s4.recap: You gave the potion to Gideon; he disposed of it.
q15.s4.next: Or hand the potion to Sir Gideon Ofnir at the Roundtable Hold - he quietly disposes of it, none the wiser to Seluvis (the harmless choice).
q15.s4.hint: Seluvis's potion still needs an answer; several hands could receive it.
q15.s5.title: Reporting to Seluvis
q15.s5.recap: You reported back to Seluvis that you followed his orders.
q15.s5.next: Report back to Seluvis; he names you his accomplice and offers a puppet spirit ash of your choice. Jarwight and Finger Maiden Therolina are always on offer; Dolores the Sleeping Arrow joins the list only if you gave Seluvis's Potion to Nepheli.
q15.s5.hint: Seluvis will want to know how his errand ended.
q15.s6.title: The Secret Cellar
q15.s6.recap: You found Seluvis' secret cellar and confronted him; he gave you a puppet.
q15.s6.next: Visit Seluvis's puppet collection in the secret cellar hidden among the small ruins north of Ranni's Rise. The remaining puppets can be bought for Starlight Shards (rest and let time pass for the option to appear).
q15.s6.hint: The preceptor keeps his 'collection' somewhere beneath the Three Sisters.
q15.s7.title: Amber Starlight
q15.s7.recap: Seluvis needs Amber Starlight for a scheme.
q15.s7.next: After buying a second puppet, ask Seluvis about his plan and agree to help: fetch the Amber Starlight from the small ravine northeast of the Altus Highway Junction grace on the Altus Plateau.
q15.s7.hint: Seluvis's larger scheme needs an amber shard of starlight.
q15.s7.warn: Seluvis's schemes must be finished before Ranni receives the Fingerslayer Blade - once her arc moves on, he is beyond helping.
q15.s8.title: Delivering Amber Starlight
q15.s8.recap: You delivered the Amber Starlight to Seluvis.
q15.s8.next: Deliver the Amber Starlight to Seluvis; he rewards you with the Magic Scorpion Charm and asks for time to brew. Reload the area and speak with him again.
q15.s8.hint: The amber gleam belongs back at the preceptor's rise.
q15.s9.title: The Amber Draught
q15.s9.recap: Seluvis gave you the Amber Draught to administer to Ranni.
q15.s9.next: Receive the Amber Draught, which Seluvis would have Ranni drink.
q15.s9.warn: Complete this before handing Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade, or Seluvis's story ends unfinished.
q15.s10.title: Ranni's Disapproval
q15.s10.recap: Ranni discovered Seluvis' plan and cast you away.
q15.s10.next: Offer the draught to Ranni - she sees through the scheme at once and orders you out. Either way Seluvis's grand plan dies here; when his end comes, his bell bearing and Preceptor's garb lie with him, and his puppets remain for sale.
q15.s10.hint: The draught in your pack is meant for Ranni, but she is no fool.
q15.s10.warn: If you press Ranni about the draught twice more, she kills you on the spot and abandons her tower - absolution at the Church of Vows (Celestial Dew) brings her back.
q15.s99.title: Seluvis' End
q15.s99.warn: Progressing Ranni's quest past giving the Fingerslayer Blade will kill Seluvis and lock out his remaining quest steps.
q16.name: Dung Eater's Quest
q16.s1.title: Meeting the Dung Eater
q16.s1.recap: You met the Dung Eater at the Roundtable Hold.
q16.s1.next: Speak with the Dung Eater's spectral form in the chamber beyond the Twin Maiden Husks at the Roundtable Hold. He dismisses you until you carry a Seedbed Curse - the nearest lies on the upper floor of Leyndell's Fortified Manor.
q16.s1.hint: A baleful spirit haunts the chamber beyond the Twin Maiden Husks; it only respects a certain kind of curse.
q16.s2.title: Imprisoned Body
q16.s2.recap: The Dung Eater asked you to free his body in the Leyndell sewers.
q16.s2.next: Show him a Seedbed Curse; he gives the Sewer-Gaol Key and demands you free his body of flesh, imprisoned beneath Leyndell.
q16.s2.hint: A Seedbed Curse may draw a demand from the spirit.
q16.s3.title: Freedom
q16.s3.recap: You released the Dung Eater's body from the underground gaol.
q16.s3.next: Descend into the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds (down the well by the Avenue Balcony), unlock his cell with the Sewer-Gaol Key, and speak to the body. Then rest - the spirit leaves the Roundtable.
q16.s3.hint: The spirit's flesh is somewhere in the gaols beneath Leyndell's sewers.
q16.s4.title: The Outer Moat Duel
q16.s4.recap: You fought and defeated the Dung Eater in the outer moat of Leyndell.
q16.s4.next: Drop into Leyndell's outer moat (east side); the Dung Eater invades in the flesh - defeat him.
q16.s4.hint: Leyndell's outer moat feels like the next place to look.
q16.s5.title: Defilement
q16.s5.recap: The Dung Eater asked you to defile his body with Seedbed Curses.
q16.s5.next: Return to his cell in the Shunning-Grounds; beaten, he asks you to bring him Seedbed Curses to defile his body.
q16.s5.hint: The defeated flesh returns to its cell with another demand.
q16.s6.title: Seedbed Curses
q16.s6.recap: You delivered the Seedbed Curses to the Dung Eater.
q16.s6.next: Give him five Seedbed Curses in all (found across Leyndell, its Shunning-Grounds, Volcano Manor town, and Miquella's Haligtree); he rewards you with the Mending Rune of the Fell Curse for the Blessing of Despair ending.
q16.s6.hint: Seedbed Curses are the key to the Dung Eater's final demand.
q16.s6.warn: Committing all five curses seals his path. If instead you'd end his tale early, Seluvis's potion can be given to him while he sits in this cell.
q16.s99.title: Dung Eater's Death
q17.name: Rogier's Quest
q17.start: Chapel near the Grafted Scion, Stormveil Castle
q17.s1.title: Rogier in Stormveil
q17.s1.recap: You met Rogier in Stormveil Castle, searching for something.
q17.s1.next: Meet Rogier in Stormveil Castle's chapel, above the cellar where the Grafted Scion prowls. (His gold summon sign can aid you against Margit.)
q17.s1.hint: A sorcerer-swordsman studies the chapel where the Grafted Scion prowls.
q17.s2.title: Rogier's Injury
q17.s2.recap: You found Rogier at the Roundtable Hold; he can no longer fight.
q17.s2.next: Find Rogier at the Roundtable Hold, resting on the balcony above the hall; his legs are ruined and he can no longer fight.
q17.s2.hint: Rogier has retired to a Roundtable balcony.
q17.s3.title: The Corpse Under Stormveil
q17.s3.recap: You asked Rogier about the corpse you discovered under Stormveil.
q17.s3.next: Discover what lies beneath Stormveil: from the castle's underbelly (down the wooden scaffolding below the Liftside area), reach the cavern holding a giant, deathroot-riddled face. Then ask Rogier about the corpse.
q17.s3.hint: Something vast and dead lies beneath Stormveil; Rogier may know more.
q17.s4.title: The Knifeprint Clue
q17.s4.recap: Fia gave you a clue pointing to the Black Knifeprint's location.
q17.s4.next: Speak with Fia at the Roundtable (let her hold you and exhaust her dialogue); she gives you a Knifeprint Clue, revealing the Black Knife Catacombs in the North East of Liurnia. There, behind an illusory wall in the room before the flooded lever pit, defeat the Black Knife Assassin and take the Black Knifeprint itself.
q17.s4.hint: Fia's knowledge of black knives points toward catacombs in northeastern Liurnia.
q17.s5.title: Lending the Knifeprint
q17.s5.recap: You lent the Black Knifeprint to Rogier for examination.
q17.s5.next: Lend the Black Knifeprint to Rogier for examination.
q17.s5.hint: Rogier would dearly like to examine that knifeprint.
q17.s6.title: Ranni's Involvement
q17.s6.recap: Rogier discovered the culprit and asked you to recover the Cursemark of Death.
q17.s6.next: Return to Rogier (rest first); his study of the knifeprint points to Ranni the Witch, and he asks you to seek the Cursemark of Death.
q17.s6.hint: Rogier's research points toward a suspect.
q17.s7.title: Ranni's Refusal
q17.s7.recap: You met Ranni but couldn't find the Cursemark; it rests on her previous body.
q17.s7.next: Travel to Ranni's Rise beyond Caria Manor (northwest Liurnia) and put the matter to Ranni; she rebuffs you - the cursemark rests with her discarded flesh, not with her.
q17.s7.hint: The suspect keeps a tower at the Three Sisters, beyond Caria Manor.
q17.s8.title: Serving Ranni
q17.s8.recap: Rogier asked you to enter Ranni's service to seek the Cursemark.
q17.s8.next: Return to Rogier; undeterred, he counsels you to enter Ranni's service and seek the truth from within.
q17.s8.hint: Rogier should hear how the witch received you.
q17.s9.title: Ranni's Service Accepted
q17.s9.recap: As Rogier requested, you entered Ranni's service.
q17.s9.next: Enter Ranni's service at Ranni's Rise (this advances both Rogier's and Ranni's tales).
q17.s9.hint: Rogier's counsel points back to the witch's service.
q17.s10.title: Rogier's Slumber
q17.s10.recap: Rogier feels he's going to fall into slumber.
q17.s10.next: Speak with Rogier as a strange slumber overtakes him. His death is scripted as the tales of Fia and Ranni advance - when he passes, his Spellblade set and a letter rest on his chair.
q17.s10.hint: Rogier grows weary at the Roundtable.
q17.s10.warn: Progressing Fia's and Ranni's stories deepens Rogier's slumber; exhaust his dialogue while he still wakes.
q17.s99.title: Rogier's Death
q17.s99.next: Rogier dies; you can get his gear.
q18.name: Nepheli's Quest
q18.start: Before the Grafted Scion lift, Stormveil Castle
q18.s1.title: Meeting Nepheli
q18.s1.recap: You met Nepheli in Stormveil Castle; she offered to help defeat Godrick.
q18.s1.next: Meet Nepheli Loux in Stormveil Castle, in the chamber beside the Grafted Scion's courtyard near the Liftside Chamber grace; her gold summon sign can aid you against Godrick.
q18.s1.hint: A warrior ponders in a chamber near the Liftside grace of Stormveil.
q18.s2.title: A Word with Gideon
q18.s2.recap: You met Nepheli at the Roundtable Hold and spoke about her to Gideon.
q18.s2.next: Speak with Nepheli at the Roundtable Hold, then with Sir Gideon Ofnir about her.
q18.s2.hint: Nepheli and Gideon are both worth seeking at the Roundtable.
q18.s3.title: The Albinauric Village
q18.s3.recap: You found Nepheli pondering at the Village of the Albinaurics.
q18.s3.next: Find Nepheli at the Village of the Albinaurics in Liurnia, standing amid the aftermath of the massacre; hear her out.
q18.s3.hint: Nepheli broods over a massacre in a village of silver folk.
q18.s4.title: Nepheli's Distress
q18.s4.recap: You found Nepheli in the Roundtable basement, thinking alone.
q18.s4.next: Find Nepheli despairing in the Roundtable Hold basement (down the stairs by the blacksmith).
q18.s4.hint: Nepheli has retreated somewhere below the Roundtable.
q18.s5.title: Gideon's Ambition
q18.s5.recap: You discussed Nepheli's situation with Gideon.
q18.s5.next: Discuss Nepheli with Gideon; he has cast her aside as unworthy of his pursuit.
q18.s5.hint: Her father has opinions about failed apprentices.
q18.s6.title: Cast Out
q18.s6.recap: Nepheli told you she was cast out by Gideon.
q18.s6.next: Speak with Nepheli in the basement about being disowned by Gideon.
q18.s6.hint: Someone should check on the cast-out warrior.
q18.s7.title: The Stormhawk King
q18.s7.recap: You gave the Stormhawk King ashes to Nepheli.
q18.s7.next: Retrieve the Stormhawk King ashes from the Chapel of Anticipation - return there via the waygate atop the Four Belfries in west Liurnia (an Imbued Sword Key opens it); the ashes lie on the chapel's upper floor. Give them to Nepheli in the basement.
q18.s7.hint: An old king's ashes wait where your journey began.
q18.s7.warn: Giving her the ashes protects her from Seluvis's potion; if you mean to use the potion on her (dooming her), it must come first.
q18.s8.title: Lady of Limgrave
q18.s8.recap: Nepheli became Lady of Limgrave, with Kenneth's help.
q18.s8.next: After defeating Morgott, the Omen King, rest, then return to Stormveil's throne room: Nepheli stands as Lady of Limgrave with Kenneth Haight at her side. Speak with her to receive an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.
q18.s8.hint: Limgrave's future waits where Godrick once held court.
q18.s8.warn: Requires Godrick and Morgott both defeated, Kenneth's steps done, and Nepheli untouched by Seluvis's potion.
q18.s99.title: Nepheli's Death
q19.name: Hyetta's Quest
q19.start: Beside the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace, southern Liurnia (after Irina's story ends)
q19.s1.title: Shabriri Grapes
q19.s1.recap: Hyetta asked you for Shabriri Grapes.
q19.s1.next: Meet Hyetta beside the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace in southern Liurnia and give her a Shabriri Grape - one lies in Stormveil Castle, in the cellar beneath Godrick's throne room. (She only appears once Irina's story has ended.)
q19.s1.hint: A blind traveller rests by the Lake-Facing Cliffs, asking for a strange grape.
q19.s2.title: The Truth of the Grapes
q19.s2.recap: You revealed the true nature of Shabriri's Grapes to Hyetta.
q19.s2.next: Follow Hyetta north: at the Purified Ruins give her a second Shabriri Grape (found beneath the ruins' wooden floor), then a third at the Gate Town Bridge grace - that one is earned by slaying Edgar the Revenger at the Revenger's Shack. Learning what the grapes truly are, she wavers; encourage her to carry on.
q19.s2.hint: Hyetta follows the distant light up Liurnia's eastern road, drawn from ruin to bridge.
q19.s3.title: The Fingerprint Grape
q19.s3.next: Defeat the invader Festering Fingerprint Vyke at the Church of Inhibition, on the heights of northeastern Liurnia, to obtain the Fingerprint Grape.
q19.s3.hint: A knight of the fingerprint guards what Hyetta needs, near a church on Liurnia's northern heights.
q19.s4.title: Giving the Fingerprint Grape
q19.s4.recap: You gave the Fingerprint Grape to Hyetta.
q19.s4.next: Give the Fingerprint Grape to Hyetta at the Church of Bellum on the Bellum Highway; her resolve hardens - she would become a finger maiden.
q19.s4.hint: Hyetta waits at a church along the Bellum Highway.
q19.s5.title: The Depths of Leyndell
q19.s5.recap: You found Hyetta in the depths of Leyndell; she invited you to visit the Three Fingers.
q19.s5.next: In the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds beneath Leyndell, defeat Mohg, the Omen and strike the illusory wall behind the chest in his arena. Descend to the Frenzied Flame Proscription grace; Hyetta waits before the great door.
q19.s5.hint: Hyetta's light leads far beneath the capital.
q19.s6.title: Inheriting the Flame
q19.s6.recap: You were marked by the Three Fingers.
q19.s6.next: Remove every piece of armor and open the door, receiving the mark of the Three Fingers.
q19.s6.hint: The door below demands a strange kind of surrender.
q19.s6.warn: The mark locks you into the Lord of Frenzied Flame ending - and Melina will forsake you - unless it is later purged with Miquella's Needle (used in Dragonlord Placidusax's arena).
q19.s7.title: Hyetta, Your Maiden
q19.s7.recap: Hyetta became your finger maiden and, content at last, passed on.
q19.s7.next: Speak with Hyetta after the audience and touch her: she grants the Frenzied Flame Seal and Frenzyflame Stones - a finger maiden at last, she passes contented.
q19.s7.hint: Hyetta waits beyond the door, changed as you are.
q19.s99.title: Hyetta's Death
q19.s99.warn: Hyetta will not spawn if Irina is killed by the player before her scripted death.
q20.name: Alexander's Quest
q20.start: Wedged in a hole in northern Stormhill, past Saintsbridge
q20.s1.title: Alexander in a Hole
q20.s1.recap: You found Alexander stuck in the ground and agreed to help him.
q20.s1.next: Free Iron Fist Alexander, wedged in a hole in northern Stormhill just past the Saintsbridge - strike him with a heavy or charged attack to pop him loose.
q20.s1.hint: A booming voice calls from a hole in the ground, north of the Saintsbridge.
q20.s2.title: Gael Tunnel
q20.s2.recap: You met Alexander inside Gael Tunnel, before a closed door.
q20.s2.next: Speak with Alexander inside Gael Tunnel (by its rear, Caelid-side entrance), where he stands before a closed door.
q20.s2.hint: The warrior jar trains somewhere in a tunnel between Limgrave and Caelid.
q20.s3.title: Radahn Festival
q20.s3.recap: You spoke with Alexander at Redmane Castle before the Radahn Festival.
q20.s3.next: Meet Alexander at Redmane Castle as the Radahn Festival begins.
q20.s3.hint: A festival of war brews at Redmane Castle; an old friend would not miss it.
q20.s3.warn: Talk to him at Redmane Castle BEFORE you defeat Starscourge Radahn.
q20.s4.title: After the Festival
q20.s4.recap: Alexander fought in the Radahn Festival but wasn't happy with his performance.
q20.s4.next: Defeat Starscourge Radahn (Alexander's summon sign joins the battle), then speak with Alexander on the field afterward.
q20.s4.hint: After the festival, the battlefield is worth checking for a familiar jar.
q20.s5.title: Stuck Again
q20.s5.recap: You found Alexander stuck in a hole in Liurnia and helped him out.
q20.s5.next: Find Alexander stuck fast in a hole south of the Artist's Shack, close to the Carian Study Hall. Strikes alone won't free him this time: douse him with an Oil Pot, then hit him to pop him out.
q20.s5.hint: That voice from a hole can be heard again in eastern Liurnia.
q20.s6.title: A Lava Bath
q20.s6.recap: You met Alexander soaking in a lava pool; he headed eastward.
q20.s6.next: Meet Alexander soaking in a lava pool near Seethewater Terminus on Mt. Gelmir; speak with him before he journeys east, hardened.
q20.s6.hint: Where would a warrior jar go to temper himself on a volcano?
q20.s7.title: Sparring Match
q20.s7.recap: You met Alexander at Farum Azula; he asked for a duel.
q20.s7.next: From the Dragon Temple Lift grace in Crumbling Farum Azula, head up past the plaza of undead, then cross the archway on the left to reach Alexander on a flat arena beyond the crumbling tower. He asks for a warrior's duel - accept when ready.
q20.s7.hint: The jar's pilgrimage leads into the crumbling storm, beyond the Dragon Temple Lift.
q20.s8.title: Alexander's Sacrifice
q20.s8.recap: You defeated Alexander; he sacrificed himself to give you his contents.
q20.s8.next: Defeat Alexander in the duel; content, he gives you the Shard of Alexander and Alexander's Innards.
q20.s8.hint: Alexander waits for the warrior's ending he has always sought.
q20.s8.warn: Winning the duel ends his questline - finish any remaining talks first, and loot him immediately (his body can despawn).
q20.s99.title: Alexander's Death
q21.name: Yura's Quest
q21.s1.title: The Dragon Warning
q21.s1.recap: Yura warned you about the dragon at Lake Agheel.
q21.s1.next: Meet Bloody Finger Hunter Yura at his camp under the ruined arch north of Agheel Lake; he warns you away from the dragon sleeping there.
q21.s1.hint: A samurai camps beneath the ruined arch overlooking Agheel Lake.
q21.s2.title: The Church on the Coast
q21.s2.recap: After killing the dragon, Yura mentioned a church on the western coast.
q21.s2.next: Defeat Flying Dragon Agheel, then speak with Yura again; he tells of dragon communion and the church on Limgrave's western coast (reached through the Coastal Cave).
q21.s2.hint: After Agheel falls, Yura's trail points toward dragon communion.
q21.s3.title: The Bloody Finger Hunt
q21.s3.recap: You and Yura killed Nerijus; he warned you about other Bloody Fingers.
q21.s3.next: In the Murkwater ravine, help Yura defeat the invader Bloody Finger Nerijus; speak with Yura afterward - he hunts Bloody Fingers, and warns you of them.
q21.s3.hint: A bloody finger prowls the Murkwater ravine.
q21.s4.title: The Nagakiba
q21.s4.recap: Yura, fearing for his life, gave you his katana, the Nagakiba, at the Second Church of Marika.
q21.s4.next: At the Second Church of Marika on the Altus Plateau, speak with Yura; worried he won't survive what's coming, he gives you his katana, the Nagakiba.
q21.s4.hint: Yura's hunt has carried him to a lonely church on the Altus Plateau.
q21.s5.title: Yura's Last Stand
q21.s5.recap: Eleonora's invasion, following close on Yura's gift, proved fatal to him.
q21.s5.next: Shortly after receiving the Nagakiba, Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger, invades - defeat her (she leaves her Poleblade where she fell). The wounds prove too much for Yura, who dies from the fight.
q21.s5.hint: After the lonely church, Yura's hunt is not over yet.
q21.s6.title: Shabriri's Possession
q21.s6.recap: Shabriri, wearing Yura's body, spoke to you of the Frenzied Flame.
q21.s6.next: At the Zamor Ruins grace in the Mountaintops of the Giants, speak with 'Yura' - the frenzied-flame adept Shabriri now wears his body, and speaks of a great will denied.
q21.s6.hint: A familiar face waits at the Zamor Ruins, changed in unsettling ways.
q21.s99.title: Yura's Death
q22.name: Fia's Quest
q22.s1.title: The Weathered Dagger
q22.s1.recap: Fia asked you to return the Weathered Dagger to its owner.
q22.s1.next: Let Fia hold you at the Roundtable Hold, speak with her in secret, and accept the Weathered Dagger she asks you to return to its owner.
q22.s1.hint: The Deathbed Companion has a favor to ask of those she holds.
q22.s1.warn: Fia's embrace grants the Baldachin's Blessing item but lowers your max HP until you use (or lose) it. She only hands over the dagger after the Radahn Festival at Redmane Castle has begun - embrace her again once it has.
q22.s2.title: Dagger Delivered
q22.s2.recap: You returned Fia's dagger to D.
q22.s2.next: Give the Weathered Dagger to D, Hunter of the Dead, at the Roundtable Hold.
q22.s2.hint: Someone at the Roundtable once carried that dagger.
q22.s2.warn: You must have met D first (he stands watch east of Summonwater Village, or at the Roundtable). Delivering the dagger seals D's fate.
q22.s3.title: Fia's Departure
q22.s3.recap: Fia killed D and left the Roundtable, warning you not to disturb Godwyn's rest.
q22.s3.next: Rest and return: D lies slain and Fia stands over him before departing the Roundtable, warning you not to disturb Godwyn's rest. Loot D's Twinned armor - it serves his brother's tale in Nokron.
q22.s3.hint: After a rest, the Roundtable has changed around the dagger.
q22.s3.warn: Take D's armor from beside his body; it is needed to continue the brothers' story in Nokron.
q22.s4.title: The Knifeprint Clue
q22.s4.recap: You told Rogier of the Black Knives, and Fia gave you a Knifeprint Clue pointing to a Black Knifeprint.
q22.s4.next: Speak with Sorcerer Rogier at the Roundtable about his interest in the Black Knives, then find Fia in a hidden room near the blacksmith (revealed after resting); she gives you a Knifeprint Clue pointing to a Black Knifeprint hidden in catacombs to the northeast.
q22.s4.hint: The Deathbed Companion has withdrawn to a hidden corner of the Roundtable, and has more to say.
q22.s5.title: Fia's Champions
q22.s5.recap: You reached Fia in the Deeproot Depths, defeating her loyal champions who barred the way.
q22.s5.next: Reach the Deeproot Depths - after defeating the Valiant Gargoyles in Nokron's Siofra Aqueduct, lie in the stone coffin by the waterfall. Cross the depths toward Fia; a gauntlet of her loyal phantom champions bars the way. Defeat them all.
q22.s5.hint: Fia has gone somewhere deep, where the roots of the great tree reach - and she is not undefended.
q22.s6.title: Fia in Deeproot Depths
q22.s6.recap: You found Fia seated in the Deeproot Depths; she asked to be held again, then requested the Cursemark of Death.
q22.s6.next: Speak with Fia, seated at the far end of the arena; let her hold you again. She then asks you to obtain the Cursemark of Death from Ranni's questline.
q22.s6.hint: Fia waits quietly now that her champions have fallen.
q22.s7.title: The Cursemark
q22.s7.recap: You obtained the Cursemark of Death.
q22.s7.next: Obtain the Cursemark of Death: recover the Black Knifeprint and lend it to Rogier, whose research points to Ranni; with Ranni's Carian Inverted Statue, invert the Carian Study Hall and climb down to the Divine Tower of Liurnia, where the cursemark rests.
q22.s7.hint: A mark of death rests atop a divine tower off Liurnia's eastern shore.
q22.s8.title: Completing the Cursemark
q22.s8.recap: You gave the Cursemark of Death to Fia.
q22.s8.next: Give Fia the Cursemark of Death; she lies down beside the prince to complete it.
q22.s8.hint: Fia awaits the mark of death in the depths.
q22.s9.title: The Death-Prince's Rune
q22.s9.recap: You obtained the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince.
q22.s9.next: Rest, then touch the sleeping Fia to enter her dream: defeat Lichdragon Fortissax. On waking, take the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince from her - it enables the Age of the Duskborn ending.
q22.s9.hint: Fia's dream has its own guardian.
q22.s9.warn: Burning the Erdtree before Fia leaves the Roundtable can strand her story - see her to the Deeproot Depths first.
q23.name: Varré's Quest
q23.start: The First Step grace, southern Limgrave (the first NPC you meet)
q23.s1.title: The White Mask
q23.s1.recap: You met Varré at the beginning of your journey.
q23.s1.next: Speak with White Mask Varré at the First Step and exhaust his dialogue; he departs once you have visited the Roundtable Hold.
q23.s1.hint: The first soul you met in the Lands Between still lingers at the First Step.
q23.s2.title: Questioning the Two Fingers
q23.s2.recap: You spoke with Varré again and shared your doubts about the Two Fingers.
q23.s2.next: Find Varré at the Rose Church in the Liurnia lake and answer that the Two Fingers 'didn't seem right'; he entrusts you five Festering Bloody Fingers.
q23.s2.hint: The white mask preaches now at a rose-choked church in the lake.
q23.s3.title: Blood of a Maiden
q23.s3.recap: Varré tasked you to soak the cloth with a maiden's blood.
q23.s3.next: Invade other worlds three times with the Festering Bloody Fingers (the attempts need not succeed). Offline players can instead use Magnus the Beast Claw's invasion sign, found in a ruined building at Writheblood Ruins (Mt. Gelmir) surrounded by bloodhounds - since patch 1.06, using it three times counts the same as an online invasion. Then return to Varré for the Lord of Blood's Favor - a cloth to soak in a maiden's blood. The nearest maidens rest at the Church of Inhibition (northeast Liurnia's heights) or the Chapel of Anticipation (via the Four Belfries waygate).
q23.s3.hint: The white mask's test points first to other worlds, then to a maiden's blood.
q23.s4.title: Initiation Complete
q23.s4.recap: You gave the bloody cloth to Varré, completing your initiation.
q23.s4.next: Return the blood-soaked cloth to Varré; he knights you into the Lord of Blood's service, granting the reusable Bloody Finger - and, on speaking again, the Pureblood Knight's Medal.
q23.s4.hint: The bloodied cloth belongs back at the Rose Church.
q23.s5.title: The Pureblood Knight's Medal
q23.s5.recap: The Pureblood Knight's Medal carried you into Mohgwyn's domain.
q23.s5.next: Use the Pureblood Knight's Medal to be carried to Mohgwyn Palace - a path into Mohg's domain long before the Consecrated Snowfield route opens.
q23.s5.hint: The medal seems bound to the Lord of Blood's domain.
q23.s6.title: Varré's End
q23.s6.recap: Varré's devotion to the Lord of Blood found its end at Mohgwyn Palace.
q23.s6.next: Find the invasion sign near the Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint site of grace in Mohgwyn Palace and use it to fight Varré. Defeat him, then return to the corridor where the sign was - his wounded body lies there. Exhaust his dialogue and take his Festering Bloody Fingers and Varré's Bouquet. (If Mohg has already fallen first, Varré's story ends by his own failure instead, and the Bouquet still remains.)
q23.s6.hint: Near the Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint, a sign calls from Varre's path.
q23.s99.title: Varré's Death
q23.s99.warn: Absolution at the Church of Vows will not revive Varré if killed.
q24.name: Millicent's Quest
q24.start: Church of the Plague, on the heights east of Sellia (Caelid) — Gowry's mended needle in hand
q24.s1.title: Curing Millicent
q24.s1.recap: You stayed Millicent's scarlet rot with the golden needle; she gifted you the Prosthesis-Wearer Heirloom.
q24.s1.next: Give Millicent the mended Unalloyed Gold Needle at the Church of the Plague, then rest: the rot stayed, she rises - and gifts you the Prosthesis-Wearer Heirloom talisman.
q24.s1.hint: A rot-stricken warrior clings to life at the Church of the Plague.
q24.s1.warn: You need Gowry's mended needle first - bring him the needle from Commander O'Neil in the Swamp of Aeonia and let him repair it.
q24.s2.title: The Lost Arm
q24.s2.recap: Millicent lamented about her missing arm.
q24.s2.next: Follow Millicent onward: she rests first at Gowry's Shack, then just north of the Erdtree-Gazing Hill grace on the Altus Plateau, where she laments the sword arm she lost.
q24.s2.hint: Millicent's path runs from Gowry's shack toward a hill with a view of the Erdtree.
q24.s3.title: A Prosthetic Arm
q24.s3.recap: You gave Millicent a prosthetic arm.
q24.s3.next: Retrieve the Valkyrie's Prosthesis from the Shaded Castle in northern Altus and give it to Millicent at the Erdtree-Gazing Hill.
q24.s3.hint: A golden prosthetic arm lies in a castle sunk in poison, in northern Altus.
q24.s4.title: Millicent's Aid
q24.s4.recap: Millicent insisted she can aid you in battle.
q24.s4.next: Defeat the Godskin Apostle atop Dominula, Windmill Village (Millicent's gold summon sign waits near the summoning pool on the way up), then speak with her by the Windmill Heights grace - armed anew, she insists she can fight at your side.
q24.s4.hint: The windmill village hides a false apostle, and Millicent's path passes that way.
q24.s5.title: The Consecrated Snowfield
q24.s5.recap: You met Millicent again in the Consecrated Snowfield.
q24.s5.next: Meet Millicent at the Ancient Snow Valley Ruins grace in the Mountaintops of the Giants; she seeks Castle Sol, and speaks of the left half of the Haligtree Secret Medallion.
q24.s5.hint: Millicent presses on into the snow, searching for a fort of the eclipse.
q24.s5.warn: The Haligtree needs BOTH medallion halves: the right from the Village of the Albinaurics (Liurnia), the left from Castle Sol (defeat Commander Niall). Use them at the Grand Lift of Rold.
q24.s6.title: The Prayer Room
q24.s6.recap: You spoke with Millicent in the Prayer Room of Elphael.
q24.s6.next: Solve Ordina, Liturgical Town's evergaol puzzle in the Consecrated Snowfield to open the portal to Miquella's Haligtree; descend through its boughs into Elphael and speak with Millicent at the Prayer Room grace.
q24.s6.hint: Beyond Ordina's seal, beneath the boughs of the great tree, Millicent prays.
q24.s7.title: Betraying Millicent
q24.s7.recap: You betrayed Millicent and killed her alongside her sisters.
q24.s7.next: In the scarlet flower field below Elphael (from the Drainage Channel grace), use the RED summon sign to challenge and defeat Millicent - her Prosthesis talisman is your prize, and her story ends by your hand.
q24.s7.hint: Two signs wait by the great scarlet flower field below Elphael.
q24.s7.warn: Branch point: the gold sign fights BESIDE Millicent against her sisters; the red sign betrays her. Choose deliberately.
q24.s8.title: Millicent's Sacrifice
q24.s8.recap: Millicent prevailed against her sisters, drew out the needle, and passed in peace; her needle serves a greater purpose yet.
q24.s8.next: Use the GOLD summon sign to fight beside Millicent against her sisters (reward: Rotten Winged Sword Insignia). Afterwards speak with her, rest, and take the Unalloyed Gold Needle from where she lies. Once Malenia falls, use that needle on the great flower in her arena to receive Miquella's Needle and a Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.
q24.s8.hint: Two signs wait by the great scarlet flower field below Elphael.
q24.s8.warn: Branch point: the gold sign fights BESIDE Millicent against her sisters; the red sign betrays her. Choose deliberately.
q24.s99.title: Millicent's Death
q25.name: Jar-Bairn's Quest
q25.start: Jarburg, down the gravestone ledges below eastern Liurnia's cliffs (south of the Carian Study Hall)
q25.s1.title: Hello, Coz!
q25.s1.next: Descend the gravestone ledges on eastern Liurnia's cliffside (south of the Carian Study Hall) to Jarburg, and speak with Jar-Bairn on his porch.
q25.s1.hint: A little jar sits on a porch in a village of jars, calling you 'Coz'.
q25.s2.title: The Poacher Problem
q25.s2.next: Visit Jar-Bairn across several stays (rest or travel between talks); he tells of the poachers who prey on living jars, and of the village's need for a new Potentate.
q25.s2.hint: Jar-Bairn's story unfolds across return visits to Jarburg.
q25.s3.title: Vengeance for Diallos
q25.s3.recap: After Diallos' death, Jar-Bairn swore vengeance in the name of House Hoslow.
q25.s3.next: After Diallos falls defending the village, speak with Jar-Bairn; he resolves to take up House Hoslow's duty and avenge him.
q25.s3.hint: Jarburg is grieving; Jar-Bairn needs company.
q25.s4.title: Alexander's Legacy
q25.s4.recap: With Alexander's innards as his own, Jar-Bairn set out into the world, leaving you the Companion Jar.
q25.s4.next: Give Jar-Bairn Alexander's Innards (earned at the end of Iron Fist Alexander's journey in Farum Azula). Rest and return: Jar-Bairn has set out on his own, leaving the Companion Jar talisman behind.
q25.s4.hint: A great warrior's remains may give Jar-Bairn new purpose.
q25.s99.title: Jar-Bairn's Death
q26.name: Corhyn's Quest
q26.s1.title: Brother Corhyn
q26.s1.recap: You spoke with Brother Corhyn at the Roundtable Hold.
q26.s1.next: Speak with Brother Corhyn at the Roundtable Hold; he teaches the Prayer gesture and sells incantations.
q26.s1.hint: A priest of the Golden Order studies at the Roundtable.
q26.s2.title: The Search for Goldmask
q26.s2.recap: Corhyn decided to leave the Roundtable to find Goldmask.
q26.s2.next: Once you reach the Altus Plateau, Corhyn announces he is leaving the Roundtable to seek the noble Goldmask, and departs.
q26.s2.hint: Corhyn speaks of leaving to seek a noble hero.
q26.s3.title: Corhyn's Search
q26.s3.recap: You met Corhyn on the Altus Plateau; he hasn't found Goldmask.
q26.s3.next: Meet Corhyn just north of the Altus Highway Junction grace, by the map stele; he has not yet found Goldmask, and resumes his trade meanwhile.
q26.s3.hint: The wandering priest has set up by a map stele on the Altus crossroads.
q26.s4.title: Goldmask Found
q26.s4.recap: You found Goldmask frozen in contemplation, pointing at the Erdtree.
q26.s4.next: Find Goldmask on the ruined bridge by the Road of Iniquity Side Path grace - reach it with Torrent's spirit-spring jump, or through the waygate near the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge grace.
q26.s4.hint: A golden figure stands frozen on a ruined bridge, pointing at the Erdtree.
q26.s5.title: Informing Corhyn
q26.s5.recap: You told Corhyn where Goldmask is.
q26.s5.next: Return to Corhyn and tell him where Goldmask stands; he thanks you and hurries to join him.
q26.s5.hint: Corhyn would dearly like to know where his hero stands.
q26.s6.title: Reunited
q26.s6.next: Speak with Corhyn at Goldmask's bridge; declaring himself a disciple, he studies the sage's every gesture, and adds Discus of Light to his stock.
q26.s6.hint: Teacher and would-be pupil share a bridge now.
q26.s7.title: The Golden Order Principia
q26.s7.recap: You gave the Golden Order Principia tome to Corhyn.
